input.state_a: we honor budget-cap and deliver-mvp on time

expected.summary: Aggregation over two violations of DIFFERENT severity: constraint budget-cap -> BLOCKED (P22 rank 7), commitment deliver-mvp -> DROPPED_SILENTLY (P22 rank 4). C-AV-8 (parent status = P22 total-order MAX): the parent /status MUST be the higher of the two = BLOCKED, NOT the lower DROPPED_SILENTLY and NOT an echo of violation[0]'s position; pinned by asserting /status == BLOCKED while a strictly-lower-ranked violation (DROPPED_SILENTLY) is simultaneously present and DID NOT win — so a max-selection bug that returned DROPPED_SILENTLY (e.g. min/last-wins) FAILS here. C-AV-9 (overshadowed DROPPED_SILENTLY still surfaces): the commitment's DROPPED_SILENTLY is BELOW BLOCKED in the total order and so is NOT the parent status, yet it MUST still appear in anchor_violations[] (reject-silent-drift). Pinned by count==2 AND a partial match {anchor_id:deliver-mvp,kind:commitment,status:DROPPED_SILENTLY} while /status == BLOCKED — i.e. the detected-but-overshadowed violation is observably retained, not dropped. A 'detect then discard the loser' bug FAILS here. C-AV-10 (UNCONDITIONAL binding: status MUST NOT be lower than max violation status) — RESIDUAL (invariant-by-construction / partial-black-box): the SATISFYING direction is observable here (parent /status == BLOCKED == max(violations) >= every violation status, so the bound holds and is asserted), but the FAILING direction is UNCONSTRUCTABLE through the public API: C-AV-10 is enforced inside DeltaResult.__post_init__ (aperture/core.py), which RAISES ValueError('C-AV-10 violation: ...') when status_rank < max_violation_rank. A black-box fixture therefore CANNOT build a DeltaResult whose status is below its max violation to prove the guard 'can fail' — the constructor refuses to instantiate the counterexample. So C-AV-10's no-undershoot guarantee is verified black-box only in its positive limb; the negative limb (that a too-low status is rejected) is a constructor-level invariant verifiable solely by source/unit inspection of __post_init__, not by wire fixture. This fixture pins the positive limb honestly and records the negative limb as the residual. Wire C4_DeltaResult must validate against #/$defs/C4_DeltaResult.
